title: 10 best herbal teas for numbness in hands
description: Ginkgo biloba, also known as maidenhair tree, teas helps with numbness in hands because of its ability to improve blood circulation and oxygenation to the extremities. The bioactive compounds present in Ginkgo biloba, such as flavonoids and terpenoids, have been shown to enhance nitric oxide production, which relaxes blood vessels and promotes healthy blood flow.
